title: F7M Straka density-current: WRF v4.7.1 em_grav2d_x ground truth vs JAX dycore, front/center region

wrf.source: pristine WRF v4.7.1 serial gfortran, ~/src/wrf_pristine/WRF, case em_grav2d_x (ideal_case=6), canonical 100m Straka namelist
wrf.ic_note: WRF delt = -15.0/Exner (temperature->theta), so theta'min ~ -16.6 K; JAX uses theta'min = -15.0 K exactly (module_initialize_ideal.F:1291-1293).

jax.source: gpuwrf operational dycore, build_density_current_setup, dt=0.1, 10 acoustic substeps, nu=75, damp_opt=3 zdamp=3000 dampcoef=0.2 (NOT canonical: WRF uses damp_opt=0), nx=500 nz=60

center_column_downdraft_at_z_1100m.note: Center column (cold-pool core) w at z~1100m; JAX and WRF AGREE through 180s then diverge.

diagnosis.agreement_window: JAX and WRF center/domain downdraft agree to within ~3% through 180 s (both peak ~21 m/s central downdraft at z~2050 m); the buoyancy/descent dynamics, acoustic solve, and advection are correct up to touchdown.
diagnosis.divergence: At the cold-pool TOUCHDOWN (180-200 s): WRF's central downdraft DECELERATES (21.0 -> 19.3 -> 17.6 -> 15.4 at 180/240/300/360 s) as the cold air spreads horizontally along the rigid floor; JAX's central downdraft ACCELERATES (21.1 @180s -> 29.5 @200s -> NaN @220-240s).
diagnosis.localization: Smooth (NOT 2dx grid-mode) central DOWNDRAFT runaway at the domain center, z~1100-2050 m, exactly at/after touchdown. max|w| is at x=0 (center), not the gust front. Top boundary w is negligible (<0.13). The descending cold pool reaches the surface but fails to convert vertical motion into horizontal outflow: WRF spreads (front 2650->5750 m, 180->360s; ~17 m/s late front speed) while JAX's front crawls (front 2350->2650 m to 240s; ~5 m/s, GPT probe) and the trapped descending air keeps accelerating to NaN.
ruled_out_this_sprint: Under-diffusion of the magnitude tested: F7L K-grad2 w-diffusion, and F7M deformation-tensor momentum diffusion (factor-2 diagonal + du/dz, dw/dx cross terms) both left the 180s trace byte-identical and still detonate at 240s
Primitive-vs-flux momentum advection (F7M flux-form advect_u/v/w wired and verified ~4% different from primitive at 120s) also left the trace unchanged and still detonates
Top boundary / Rayleigh damping (max|w| is at the center, not the top; damp_opt is strictly stabilizing and cannot cause growth)
Lower BC surface w (w(surface)=0 correctly enforced in both; matches WRF advance_w :1417-1429)
remaining_root_cause_candidates: Touchdown horizontal-spreading coupling: the descending cold pool's surface high-pressure cushion is not converting w into horizontal u-outflow strongly enough -> the front theta' does not advance despite large low-level u (GPT probe: u_outflow 25-36 m/s while front crawls at 5 m/s) -> trapped descending air accelerates w to NaN.
Possible thin spurious surface u-jet (large |u| confined to a near-surface layer that does not transport the bulk cold theta' front).

Per-substep WRF savepoint diff at the touchdown column (~i=center, z<1500m, t=180-200s) is the next decisive instrument; the front-region wrfout-only diff localizes to touchdown but cannot resolve which acoustic-substep operator (omega/ww continuity vs advance_uv acoustic PGF vs mass coupling) under-drives the horizontal spreading.
